🔒 Notion Dashboard Setup

Paste your API proxy URL to connect to your real Notion databases. Not set up yet? See setup guide below.

Setup Steps

  1. Deploy the API proxy to Vercel or Netlify (see documentation)
  2. Add your ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to environment variables
  3. Paste your proxy URL above (e.g., https://your-project.vercel.app/api/proxy)
  4. Click "Connect Dashboard" to load your Notion data

Security: Your API key stays on the server. This dashboard only sends requests to your proxy.
